risk._comment_drawdown: PAPER backstop = 25% (consistent with trend_timing_v1 @ 1.0x exposure, expected ~24% DD; user accepted this). For a FUNDED prop account, set max_total_drawdown_pct = max_total_drawdown_pct_funded (8.0) AND set trend.base_exposure = 0.33. The soft de-risk ladder in trend.* protects capital well before this catastrophe backstop trips.

trend._comment: Live-controllable trend-timing params. memory/adaptive.py lowers exposure one rung down the ladder for capital preservation when realised drawdown breaches soft/deep thresholds, and restores it after recovery. Every change is logged + sent to Telegram. sma_months robustness is re-validated monthly (flag-only, no auto-flip).
